Platform Engineering Lead
Meridian Financial — New York, NY (Remote-friendly)

About the role

Meridian Financial is hiring a Platform Engineering Lead to build and grow a new platform team from scratch. This is a player-coach role: you will be hands-on technically while also managing a small team and owning the platform roadmap. You will report to the CTO.

Responsibilities

- Lead a team of 4-6 platform engineers, including hiring, mentoring, and performance management
- Own the technical roadmap for our cloud infrastructure (AWS and Azure multi-cloud)
- Drive adoption of internal developer platforms and self-service tooling
- Define engineering standards for infrastructure as code, CI/CD, and observability
- Work with senior stakeholders (CTO, VP Engineering, CISO) to align platform strategy
- Own the infrastructure budget ($3-5M annually) and drive cost optimisation
- Establish SLOs and reliability targets across platform services
- Drive security and compliance posture across the platform (SOC 2 Type II, PCI-DSS)

Requirements

- 8+ years of cloud engineering experience
- 3+ years leading or managing engineering teams
- Strong AWS experience; Azure experience highly valued
- Experience with Kubernetes at scale
- Demonstrated ability to hire, onboard, and develop engineers
- Experience presenting technical strategy to C-suite or board-level stakeholders
- Budget management experience
- Familiarity with SOC 2 and/or PCI-DSS compliance requirements

Nice to have

- Experience building internal developer platforms (Backstage or similar)
- FinOps certification or demonstrated cost engineering experience
- Experience in financial services or fintech
- Multi-cloud architecture experience

Salary: $220,000 – $260,000 + equity + bonus
